'''âl-r-ng''' ('''kalarang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whuffle|whuffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whuffle|whuffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kalarang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilarang|thilarang]] || [[word:jilarang|jilarang]] || [[word:shilarang|shilarang]] || [[word:kilarang|kilarang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthularang|thuthularang]] || [[word:jujularang|jujularang]] || [[word:shushularang|shushularang]] || [[word:kukularang|kukularang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thularang|thularang]] || [[word:jularang|jularang]] || [[word:shularang|shularang]] || [[word:kularang|kularang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thularang|thularang]] || [[word:jularang|jularang]] || [[word:shularang|shularang]] || [[word:kularang|kularang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelarang|thelarang]] || [[word:jelarang|jelarang]] || [[word:shelarang|shelarang]] || [[word:kelarang|kelarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholarang|thotholarang]] || [[word:jojolarang|jojolarang]] || [[word:shosholarang|shosholarang]] || [[word:kokolarang|kokolarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholarang|tholarang]] || [[word:jolarang|jolarang]] || [[word:sholarang|sholarang]] || [[word:kolarang|kolarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholarang|tholarang]] || [[word:jolarang|jolarang]] || [[word:sholarang|sholarang]] || [[word:kolarang|kolarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlarang|thĂŠlarang]] || [[word:jĂŠlarang|jĂŠlarang]] || [[word:shĂŠlarang|shĂŠlarang]] || [[word:kĂŠlarang|kĂŠlarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalarang|thathalarang]] || [[word:jajalarang|jajalarang]] || [[word:shashalarang|shashalarang]] || [[word:kakalarang|kakalarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalarang|thalarang]] || [[word:jalarang|jalarang]] || [[word:shalarang|shalarang]] || [[word:kalarang|kalarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalarang|thalarang]] || [[word:jalarang|jalarang]] || [[word:shalarang|shalarang]] || [[word:kalarang|kalarang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalarang|shalarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalarang|goshalarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalarang|gokishalarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalarangnĂŒ|shalarangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalarangnknĂŒ|goshalarangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalarangnĂŒ|gokishalarangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalarangshĂ«|shalarangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalarangnkshĂ«|goshalarangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalarangshĂ«|gokishalarangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalarangro|shalarangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalarangnkro|goshalarangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalarangro|gokishalarangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalarangmu|shalarangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalarangnkmu|goshalarangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalarangmu|gokishalarangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalarangsher|shalarangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalarangnksher|goshalarangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalarangsher|gokishalarangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalarang|shalarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalarangnkng|goshalarangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalarang|gokishalarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalarangya|shalarangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalarangnkya|goshalarangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalarangya|gokishalarangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalarangyam|shalarangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalarangnkyam|goshalarangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalarangyam|gokishalarangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalarangnĂŒshĂ«|shalarangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalarangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalarangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalarangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalarangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalarangnĂŒro|shalarangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalarangnknĂŒro|goshalarangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalarangnĂŒro|gokishalarangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalarangnĂŒmu|shalarangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalarangnknĂŒmu|goshalarangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalarangnĂŒmu|gokishalarangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalarangshĂ«nĂŒ|shalarangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalarangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalarangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalarangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalarangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalarangshĂ«ro|shalarangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalarangnkshĂ«ro|goshalarangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalarangshĂ«ro|gokishalarangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalarangshĂ«mu|shalarangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalarangnkshĂ«mu|goshalarangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalarangshĂ«mu|gokishalarangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalarangronĂŒ|shalarangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalarangnkronĂŒ|goshalarangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalarangronĂŒ|gokishalarangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalarangroshĂ«|shalarangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalarangnkroshĂ«|goshalarangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalarangroshĂ«|gokishalarangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalarangromu|shalarangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalarangnkromu|goshalarangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalarangromu|gokishalarangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalarangmunĂŒ|shalarangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalarangnkmunĂŒ|goshalarangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalarangmunĂŒ|gokishalarangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalarangmushĂ«|shalarangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalarangnkmushĂ«|goshalarangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalarangmushĂ«|gokishalarangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalarangmuro|shalarangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalarangnkmuro|goshalarangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalarangmuro|gokishalarangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
